title: perezia ciliosa
intro: Perezia ciliosa, also known as the golden perezia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Andes mountain range in South America, where it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for digestive health, wound healing, and immune system support. Perezia ciliosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
